title: taraxacum janchenii
intro: Taraxacum janchenii, also known as Janchen's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum janchenii include its potential to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver and kidney function. Taraxacum janchenii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw leaf or flower in salads or as a herbal infusion.
